g.text: Endpoint, bounded-coupling, reserve-like, and routed-output demonstrations

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Helvetica', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'Liberation Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #555555

g.text: Endpoint tables can express declared margins, reserve-like summaries, and reduced-architecture tests
